title: [CS] Roleplay Decor
description: A mod that aims to bring decor items & blocks that many roleplayers commonly require.
body:
# [CS] Roleplay Decor

This mod requires [CS] Library to function, and is a dependency.



## [Our thought process]

We currently do quite a bit of tomfoolery that requires the items in this mod.
However we also made it with the intention of providing things that many others commonly need. 
There may be some odd things in there at a glance, such as organs and blood.
However this is due to our Roleplaying of Fnaf.



### [Inclusions]
Organs
New & Old phones
Misc items such as keys
Tools such as hammers or crowbars
Boards for boarding things up
Copious amounts of pure ****
Flesh blocks
Television, both vintage and flatscreen
Laptop & Computer items
And a little more.

Our discord link is https://discord.gg/adnGN3ZnJ2 
Feel free to join and talk to us about bugs and issues, or give suggestions on what to add next.
